ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label indicating the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Measurement for the bust in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement for the waist in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Measurement for sleeve length in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Measurement for hips in inches */,
  "bottom_length" REAL /* Measurement for bottom length in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Measurement for shoulder width in inches */,
  "sleeve_width" REAL /* Measurement for sleeve width at the widest point in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Measurement for chest in inches */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Measurement for inseam length in inches (relevant for pants) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product size mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this specific size */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product for the specific size */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the size was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the size inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific order item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the specific order item */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the order item was added to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences (e.g., preferred sizes, colors, brands) */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the customer became a member */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., exchange, refund) */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount to be refunded */,
  "return_process_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory audit record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product undergoing inventory change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity changed in the inventory */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., new shipment, return) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
